creator: samflanker@gmail.com
text:
Command Line Interface for the MegaRAID SAS family of RAID controllers,
used to configure and manage connected storage devices.




 shar `find /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5`
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5
#       /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/Makefile
#       /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/distinfo
#       /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/pkg-descr
#
echo c - /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5
mkdir -p /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/Makefile << 'd2dca8590ad7c301f56a7d41de0b697c'
X# New Ports collection makefile for:   megacli5
X# Date created:                29 December 2009
X# Whom:                        Vladimir Ermakov <samflanker@gmail.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=      megacli
XPORTVERSION=   5.00.15
XCATEGORIES=    sysutils
XMASTER_SITES=  http://www.lsi.com/DistributionSystem/AssetDocument/
XDISTNAME=      ${PORTVERSION}_FreeBSD_MegaCLI
X
XMAINTAINER=    samflanker@gmail.com
XCOMMENT=       SAS MegaRAID FreeBSD MegaCLI
X
XONLY_FOR_ARCHS=        i386 amd64
XIA32_BINARY_PORT=      yes
X
XRESTRICTED=    May not be redistributed in binary form
XNO_CDROM=      yes
X
XUSE_ZIP=       yes
X
XNO_BUILD=      yes
XNO_WRKSUBDIR=  yes
X
XCONFLICTS=     megacli-4.*
X
XPLIST_FILES=   sbin/MegaCli
X
Xdo-install:
X       ${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/MegaCli  ${PREFIX}/sbin
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
d2dca8590ad7c301f56a7d41de0b697c
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/distinfo << '4ff1eeda073c20ca5f63cdb4ed4230b5'
XMD5 (5.00.15_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip) = 167b7c6e857a6d8221415982f8c96cb8
XSHA256 (5.00.15_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip) = 42ea864eba04271d6ac8f6645f195a78f4f80071d59cc624fcaeac18041d68a1
XSIZE (5.00.15_FreeBSD_MegaCLI.zip) = 643897
4ff1eeda073c20ca5f63cdb4ed4230b5
echo x - /usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/sysutils/megacli5/pkg-descr << '721804179a735cd282a26e03108d5ea9'
XCommand Line Interface for the MegaRAID SAS family of RAID controllers,
Xused to configure and manage connected storage devices.
X
XSupported Controllers
X==================
X
XMegaRAID SAS 9260-4i
XMegaRAID SAS 9260-8i
XMegaRAID SAS 9260DE-8i
XMegaRAID SAS 9280-8e
XMegaRAID SAS 9280DE-8e
X
721804179a735cd282a26e03108d5ea9
exit
